creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=7632b651e6578dc8198712a132de6c0a76c8a9e4

commit 7632b651e6578dc8198712a132de6c0a76c8a9e4
Author:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-03-28 10:37:04 +0000
Commit:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-03-28 10:37:04 +0000

    games/anki: Update to 2.1.49

    While I'm here:

    * Use ECHO_CMD instead of ECHO as the latter one is already defined in
      /usr/share/mk/sys.mk, which can either be "echo" or "true" if the make
      flag -s is given.

    Changelog:

    https://github.com/ankitects/anki/releases/tag/2.1.49

    PR:             262735
    Reported by:    Pau Amma
    MFH:            No (2022Q2 is soon)

 games/anki/distinfo | 10 +++++-----
 2 files changed, 8 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-)
